div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the Soviet Union (Harriman)
div.p: 2228. ReDeptel 2148, September 7. Department is informed by Legation BernTelegram 5960, September 9, not printed. that Swiss Legation Bucharest has reported that American colony in Rumania desires learn when representatives of this Government will arrive to protect United States interests vis-à-vis the Soviet authorities.

From another sourceTelegram 338, September 9, 6 p.m., from Caserta, not printed. Department learns of feeling by approximately 500 Americans in Rumania that they require further protection. Department is requesting BernTelegram 3217, September 16, midnight, not printed. to ascertain from Swiss Legation Bucharest exactly what if any obstacles prevent normal extension of protection to Americans.
